earnings.assumptions: Estimate reflects major streaming durability, recurrent R&B-pop playlist placement, and songwriter participation.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label master ownership with artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared with meaningful writer-side economics
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific sale adjustment is assumed
ownership.notes: Modeled from long-tail hit-song behavior, not public royalty disclosures.
